name: Warm Artichoke and Spinach Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 heaping cup each Swiss and Monterey Jack cheese, finely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a temperature that is comfortable for serving.
2. Cook the fresh spinach according to package instructions until just wilted.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked spinach, seasoned salt, water, white pepper, minced garlic, artichoke hearts, whipping cream, olive oil, and shredded cheeses.
4. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
5. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and place in the preheated oven.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 20-25 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
7. Turn off the heat and allow the dip to cool slightly before serving.
